updates.title: Presidential Declaration of a Major Disaster for Public Assistance Only for the Territory of Guam
updates.summary: This is notice of the Presidential declaration of a major disaster for Public Assistance Only for the territory of Guam (FEMA- 4921-DR), dated June 30, 2026. Incident: Super Typhoon Sinlaku.

updates.title: Amendment of Class D Airspace and Class E Airspace Over New Bedford, MA
updates.summary: This action amends Class D and Class E airspace over New Bedford, MA. This action adds a 0.7 mile long, 3.6-mile-wide extension to the northwest side of the existing Class D airspace to properly contain current Instrument Flight Rules (IFR) operations. This action also updates the airport name and geographic coordinates in both the New Bedford, MA Class D and Class E airspace legal descriptions. This action also repl

updates.title: Endangered Species; File No. 29736
updates.summary: Notice is hereby given that Katrina Phillips, Ph.D., Dauphin Island Sea Lab 101, Bienville Blvd., Dauphin Island, AL 36528, has applied in due form for a permit to take loggerhead (Caretta caretta), green (Chelonia mydas), Kemp's ridley (Lepidochelys kempii), hawksbill (Eretmochelys imbricata), and leatherback (Dermochelys coriacea) sea turtles for purposes of scientific research.

updates.title: Renewal of Department of Defense Federal Advisory Committee-National Security Education Board
updates.summary: The DoD (referred to herein as "the Department," "Department of War" or "DoW") is publishing this notice to announce that it is renewing the National Security Education Board (NSEB) as a non-discretionary Federal advisory committee.

updates.title: Privacy Act of 1974; System of Records
updates.summary: In accordance with the Privacy Act of 1974, the Defense Logistics Agency (DLA) is providing notice to rescind a system of records titled "DLA Hometown News Release," S190.10. The system of records was established for the purpose of distributing information on activities and accomplishments of DLA military and civilian personnel to hometown newspapers and broadcast stations throughout the United States. updates.title: South Atlantic Fishery Management Council (Council)-Public Meetings
updates.summary: The South Atlantic Fishery Management Council (Council) will hold three in-person public hearings and one webinar hearing pertaining to amendment 60 to the Fishery Management Plan (FMP) for the Snapper Grouper Fishery of the South Atlantic Region.
